name: Sauerkraut Balls
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can sauerkraut, rinsed, well-drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir ground pork and onion in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until pork is done; drain.
2. Stir in ham, flour, mustard, and red pepper sauce thoroughly.
3. Stir in milk. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until hot, about 5 minutes; remove from heat.
4. Stir in parsley and sauerkraut; cool.
5. Heat margarine in a jelly roll pan (15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1 inch) at 400°F until melted.
6. Mix eggs and water.
7. Shape pork mixture into 1-inch balls; dip each ball in the egg mixture.
8. Coat evenly with bread crumbs.
9. Place the balls in the pan with margarine.
10. Bake uncovered for 15 minutes; turn.
11. Bake until hot and golden brown, about 15 minutes longer.
12. Serve with Mustard Sauce. About 5 dozen appetizers; 70 calories per appetizer.
